overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through Night City's downtown district. The player character walks along wet neon-lit sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection beneath towering holographic billboards, and gazes up at skyscrapers covered in advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit sidewalk approaching Fourth Wall entertainment venue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward the illuminated Fourth Wall sign, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: tall building with prominent blue neon 'FOURTH WALL' signage at street level
large floating advertisement displaying vehicle financing rates at 31.1%
tall industrial-style street lamp illuminating the sidewalk
concrete stairs leading up to an adjacent building entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet concrete sidewalk at night, walking toward the brightly lit 'Fourth Wall' building. Neon holographic advertisements float above the street to the right, while other pedestrians walk ahead. The street is moderately busy with passing vehicles visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: character steps onto yellow crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
futuristic sedan passes by on the right while crossing continues

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians, moving from left sidewalk to right

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
tall glass and steel towers covered in illuminated advertisements on the far side
large vertical advertisement showing a purple beverage can with 'IT'S BIG' text

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide urban intersection via a yellow striped crosswalk, moving away from the Fourth Wall building. Other pedestrians cross in the same direction while vehicles pass on the road. The view opens up to show towering skyscrapers ahead covered in massive holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk lined with palm trees beneath towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to gaze at the towering skyscrapers and neon signage overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk while occasionally looking up at the towering architecture and neon displays

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in front of the buildings
yellow-railed elevated walkway crossing above the street ahead
advertisement reading 'SWEET SPEED 2' with green text
immense tower covered in multiple layers of glowing billboards and neon signs

segments.scene_description: Walking along the far sidewalk, the scene features tall palm trees and an elevated pedestrian bridge ahead. The camera tilts upward to reveal massive skyscrapers covered in dense neon advertising. The street is less crowded here, with the character moving steadily past various holographic billboards toward the elevated walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban corridor that evolves from a crowded sidewalk into a vast vista of towering skyscrapers. It begins on a wet concrete walkway heading toward the brightly lit Fourth Wall building, with holographic advertisements floating over a stream of passing vehicles. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up to cross a wide, yellow-striped intersection, shifting the perspective away from the building and toward a horizon of massive, advertisement-covered towers. The movement then transitions onto a quieter far sidewalk lined with tall palm trees, where the camera tilts upward to emphasize the scale of the dense neon architecture. Finally, the path leads steadily past glowing billboards toward an elevated pedestrian bridge under the glow of the city's towering skyline.
